name: Minted Veggie Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 Cups plain lowfat yogurt, or nonfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Use jicama, celery, radishes, broccoli, cauliflower, carrots or any other vegetables of your choice.
2. Add yogurt, sour cream, garlic cloves, cucumber, and mint to a food processor or blender.
3. Process until well combined.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Chill before serving.
6. Serve surrounded by fresh vegetables.
